Introduction","snippet":"## 1. Introduction

**Geotechnical investigation report on file** for Chen Residence footing design (Terratech report TT-GEO-2026-0442).

Two machine-bored boreholes (BH-1 front, BH-2 rear) and two test pits (TP-1, TP-2) were completed to inform footing design for a proposed two-storey dwelling. Survey by North Shore Surveying indicates approx. 2.1 m site fall.","score":0.01639344262295082},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"b5e19304-a2c4-5a71-842e-9112f2ec8c21","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"4. Site classification","snippet":"## 4. Site classification

**AS 2870-2011 Site Classification: H1** (highly reactive clay)

Ys estimated **40ÔÇô50 mm** (normal moisture conditions). Recommend **stiffened raft slab** or **deepened beams with piers** to refusal in weathered claystone. Conventional strip footings **not recommended** without engineering redesign.","score":0.016129032258064516},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"c2713418-48c2-5557-a650-7c3c9985538c","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"5. Key recommendations","snippet":"## 5. Key recommendations

1. Structural engineer to adopt H1 parameters; provide footing design to certifier
2. Site drainage critical ÔÇö maintain moisture equilibrium; no ponding against slab
3. Excavation benching may be required on cut slope at rear; temporary shoring TBC
4. Rock encountered TP-2 at 1.8 m ÔÇö allow for excavation difficulty in cost plan","score":0.015873015873015872},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"2dcd3f04-7e3c-5344-9043-41cc44660d57","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"GEOTECHNICAL INVESTIGATION REPORT","snippet":"# GEOTECHNICAL INVESTIGATION REPORT

- **NBN:** Pit in footpath, north of lot.","score":0.014285714285714285}]

You are answering questions about project 59dd9635-4b63-4251-b903-348ae9fa2a2b. Its uploaded documents are already ingested and fully searchable via the clerk tools. Question: What bearing capacity does the Terratech geotechnical report recommend for the southern footings?

[{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"04c86e4c-8fa4-599e-8621-d82e218b0904","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"1. Introduction","snippet":"## 1. Introduction

**Geotechnical investigation report on file** for Chen Residence footing design (Terratech report TT-GEO-2026-0442).

Two machine-bored boreholes (BH-1 front, BH-2 rear) and two test pits (TP-1, TP-2) were completed to inform footing design for a proposed two-storey dwelling. Survey by North Shore Surveying indicates approx. 2.1 m site fall.","score":0.01639344262295082},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"b5e19304-a2c4-5a71-842e-9112f2ec8c21","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"4. Site classification","snippet":"## 4. Site classification

**AS 2870-2011 Site Classification: H1** (highly reactive clay)

Ys estimated **40ÔÇô50 mm** (normal moisture conditions). Recommend **stiffened raft slab** or **deepened beams with piers** to refusal in weathered claystone. Conventional strip footings **not recommended** without engineering redesign.","score":0.016129032258064516},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"c2713418-48c2-5557-a650-7c3c9985538c","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"5. Key recommendations","snippet":"## 5. Key recommendations

1. Structural engineer to adopt H1 parameters; provide footing design to certifier
2. Site drainage critical ÔÇö maintain moisture equilibrium; no ponding against slab
3. Excavation benching may be required on cut slope at rear; temporary shoring TBC
4. Rock encountered TP-2 at 1.8 m ÔÇö allow for excavation difficulty in cost plan","score":0.015873015873015872},{"document_id":"7672dda4-d8b2-581f-b0e2-d2bb18c11256","chunk_id":"2dcd3f04-7e3c-5344-9043-41cc44660d57","document":"06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","relative_path":"04-projects/test-project-112/03-design/01-due-diligence/06-geotechnical-report-terratech.md","page_or_section":"GEOTECHNICAL INVESTIGATION REPORT","snippet":"# GEOTECHNICAL INVESTIGATION REPORT
